titleStmt.title: SII 23.493: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 493. (A.R. No. 493 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Uttaravēdīśvara temple—on the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine Kṛishṇadēvarāya. Śaka 1440: 1518 A.D.

summary.p: This is dated in the cyclic year Dhātu, Siṁha, śu. Paurṇami, Friday, Maghā (Mahā-Maghā) which probably corresponds to A.D. 1518, August 20; The cyclic year was Bahudhānya and the Nak-Śatabhishaj. This records a sarvamānya gift of the taxes jōḍi, śūlavari, kallaṇai, Nāṭṭukkāṇikkāi, rāyavarttanai, and avasaravarttanai amounting to 90 poṉ and due to the king from Mēṟkāvēri-Māgaṇai in favour of the temple of Śoṉṉavāraṟivār at Tirutturutti Kuṟṟālam, on a representation made to him by Karaṇikam Vaśavarasar, son of Sōmarasar of Tiruppeyaṟṟūr in Eyil-nāḍu, a division of Toṇḍai-maṇḍalam. This amount was to be utilised for offerings, adornments, repairs and for special festivals every month, to the god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastuḥ . nirvighnamastu . svasti śrīmaṉ mahārājarādhirāja rājaparameśvaran bhūṟuva dekṣaṇa paccima Uttara catu camuttirādhipati śrīvirapiṟatāpa kaṇṭanāṭukoṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu koṭātāṉ bhāṣaikkut tappuvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ muvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ voṭṭiyataḷavi pāṭaṉ pucapala virapiṟatāpa śrīkṛṣṇa tevamakārāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 4 10- mel
cellāniṉṟa tātucaṅkvattarattu ciṅkanāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu pavarṉamaiyum cukkiravāramum peṟṟa makānakṣattirattunāḷ māmāṅkapuṇṇiyakālattile coḻamaṇṭalattu tiruveḻuntūrnāṭṭu melkūṟu teyvastāṉam tirutturutti kuṟṟālamuṭaiyār coṉṉa vāraṟivāṟku taṉmacātaṉam paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭi meṟkāveri mākaṇaik kuḷḷe naṭantuvarukiṟa coṭi cūlavari kallaṇai nāṭṭukkāṇikkai Irāyavattaṉai [ha]vataravattaṉai Uṭpaṭa naṭantuvarukiṟa toṇṇūṟu poṉṉum caṟuvamāṉiyam Āka paṇṇit
taraveṇum Eṉṟu toṇṭaimaṇṭalattu Eyyil nāṭṭut tirup peyaṟṟūr comaracar puttiṟaṉ nampi karaṇikkam vacavaracar Inta koyilil Iṟukkiṟa coṭi cūlavari toṇṇūṟu poṉṉum melkā veri mākaṇaiyil kaḻittu Uṭaiyār coṉṉavāṟuaṟivār koyi lukku pūcai naṭakkaveṇum Eṉṟu viṇṇappañ ceykaiyil nām Inta toṇṇūṟu poṉṉum Uṭaiyār coṉṉavāṟṟivāṟku Amutupaṭi neyivettiyam Aṅkaraṅkavaiyipokam tiruppaṇi tiṅkaḷ tivatam tirunāḷ naṭakkatakkatāka kaṭṭaḷai Iṭṭu Inta toṇṇūṟu poṉṉum meṟkāveriyil mākaṇaiyi
l kaḻittapaṭiāle cantiṟātittiyavaraiyum caṟuvvammāṇiyam Āka naṭantuvarak kaṭavatākavum śubhamastu . svadattām paradattām pā yo hareti vasundharām ṣaṣṭhim varṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyām jāyate kṛmi[ḥ .*] svadattāa dviguṇam puṇyam paradattanupālanam paradattāpahā reṇa svadattam niṣphalam bhavet . dānapālanayormadhye dānāt śre
yonupālanam . dānāt svargamavāpnoti pālanādadvyutam padam śubhamastu .
Digital edition of SII 23.493 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
